[REDACTED-ID]_F001_F002_question_brute.title: Pre-Auth Security Question Brute Force + Password Reset

evidence.no_CheckWebSession: Zero calls to CheckWebSession (0x4c1bd8) in entire CResetPwdHandler range (0x4c7400-0x4cad00)
evidence.no_rate_limiting: No counter, timestamp, or lockout mechanism in checkQuestionAnswer handler (0x4c9318)
evidence.password_reset: resetPwdByQuestion (0x4c8824) accepts user, answers, and new password without requiring current password

[REDACTED-ID]_F001_F002_question_brute.note: Live validation requires HTTP port 80 access to a Rhea device with security questions configured. Test hosts only expose DVRIP port 37777.
